name: repo_policy_violation

blocked_paths.message: Migration changes need database owner review.

diff:
diff --git a/migrations/002_add_user.sql b/migrations/002_add_user.sql
new file mode 100644

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@

+CREATE INDEX idx_users_plan ON users(plan);
